form.formComment: Last start by a nose when quickly away, (Fr6) at Ararat (2:12.70) beating Bubble Over in MAIDEN on March 23 at $23 at the bell was leading 3.8. Going well enough score again.

form.formComment: Well-beaten 24 days ago at this track over 1780m, and two back 8th (Sr1) over 2190m at this track beaten 25 m by Keayang Payton (2:44.00) in 4yo+ NR up to 64 on March 6 at $81. Likely to struggle again.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Sr2) over 1790m at Ararat, at the bell was 9th-19.8 beaten 11 m by Wazowski (2:10.30) in NR 45 to 50 on March 23 at $61. Two runs back was driven from back in the field when 2nd (Fr5) over 1780m after showing early speed and racing wide at this track, beaten 15 m by Roblen Ranger (2:12.40) in 4yo+ NR 41 to 45 on March 14 at $34. Win doesn't look likely.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fifth behind Roblen Ranger at this track over 1780m in a 4yo+ NR 41 to 45 on March 14 at $7.50. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4.5 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind Line Up Jacquie at Ararat over 2195m in a NR 39 to 45 on March 23 at $6. Has the ability to play a major role.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to his best. Last start 9th (Fr7) over 1800m after showing early speed and racing wide at Globe Derby Park beaten 23 m by Uptown Miss (2:15.70) in 3yo+ 1 LIFETIME WIN on March 21 at $1.30. The run previous was well back in the run when 6th (Fr5) over 1780m at this track beaten 35 m by Keayang Passion (2:08.80) in 3yo No NR on March 14 at $10. Nicely placed to find a bit of form.

form.formComment: Began his campaign last start running broke in score up and was out of position at the start surrendered the lead and finished 6th (Fr1) over 2190m after showing early speed at this track well beaten by Go Jack Crocker (2:45.10) in 4yo+ NR 46 to 51 on March 14 at $51. Needs to lift.
